content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama Daily Update (Apr 2, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day's activity for elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama primarily involved the identification of a critical issue related to the `postinstall` script, which is currently failing due to a missing file in the published tarball.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

No new features, bug fixes, code refactoring, documentation enhancements, or tests were added today.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
No new pull requests were opened today.

## CLOSED ISSUES
No issues were closed today.

## NEW ISSUES
### Postinstall Script Failure
A new issue was reported concerning the `postinstall` script failing during installation. The problem stems from the `scripts/install-ollama.js` file not being included in the published tarball, leading to a "Module not found" error during `bun pm trust --all` operations [#22](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama/issues/22).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
No active issues had more than 3 comments today.
